name: Utica Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Utica Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, electronics, vehicles, and other valuables with 3-month terms at 3% + $3/month.
description_long: Utica Jewelry & Loan operates as a traditional pawn shop in Utica, accepting a wide range of personal assets as collateral for short-term loans. The business is led by Mike Shakkuri and maintains an active retail operation selling both pawned items and bullion/coins to the public through their website and physical location. The company accepts collateral across an unusually broad spectrum of asset categories, from jewelry and diamonds to vehicles, jet skis, boats, and ATVs, demonstrating flexibility beyond typical pawn operations that focus primarily on jewelry and electronics. Their loan terms are standardized at 3 months with a monthly cost of 3% plus $3, providing transparency on the borrowing structure without variable APR disclosures common to other lending products. What distinguishes Utica Jewelry & Loan is the explicit breadth of accepted collateral items—including specialty categories like furs, jackets, name-brand apparel, collectibles, and musical instruments—which appeals to customers with non-traditional assets needing quick liquidity. The company maintains an e-commerce presence with shipping capabilities and newsletter subscription for sales notifications, suggesting they actively market both lending and retail sales channels. The straightforward 3-month loan structure with fixed monthly costs makes repayment predictable, though the high effective annual rate (36%+ annualized) and short loan window are typical pawn-shop constraints. This business model is designed for customers who own valuable physical assets but need immediate cash without credit checks or income verification.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Accepts extremely broad range of collateral including vehicles, jet skis, boats, ATVs, electronics, jewelry, collectibles, and specialty items
Transparent fixed-rate loan structure: 3% + $3/month with clear 3-month terms, no hidden fees mentioned
No credit check required—purely asset-based lending accessible to those with poor or no credit
Quick cash access process: bring item in, get assessed and valued same-day, receive funds immediately
Retail resale operation allows customers to buy other pawned items, creating secondary marketplace benefit
Established local business with named owner (Mike Shakkuri) providing personal accountability
Active online presence with e-commerce, shipping options, and regular sales/event promotions
cons: Extremely high effective annual interest rate (36%+ APR equivalent), one of the costliest borrowing options available
Very short 3-month loan term creates risk of default and asset loss if repayment is missed
Risk of permanent asset loss—if loan isn't repaid, collateral is forfeited and sold, not recoverable
Encourages high-interest debt cycles; borrowers may repeatedly pawn items, paying cumulative interest
Website lacks specific location/phone number details, business hours, or loan limits, requiring direct contact for details
best_for: Individuals with valuable physical assets who need immediate emergency cash without credit checks
People with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
Short-term borrowers who can repay within 3 months and have specific collateral to pledge
Collectors or specialty item owners seeking quick liquidation options for non-standard assets
diagnosis: Utica Jewelry & Loan is best for individuals with valuable physical assets who need fast emergency cash and cannot access traditional credit. The main caveat is that the 36%+ annualized interest rate and risk of permanent asset forfeiture make this an extremely expensive and risky borrowing option that should only be used when no alternatives exist.
services: Jewelry and diamond assessment and valuation
Vehicle pawn loans (cars, motorcycles, ATVs, jet skis, boats)
Electronics pawn loans (computers, laptops, power tools)
Bullion and precious metals sales and buying
E-commerce retail sales of pawned merchandise
Online shopping with shipping and international delivery options
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
